articles.excerpt: Kwatra appreciated Sessions's steadfast support for a stronger India-US partnership; On Thursday, Kwatra met US Trade Representative Jamieson Greer and former National Security Adviser Robert O’Brien
articles.content: Indian Ambassador to the US Vinay Mohan Kwatra held talks with US lawmaker Pete Sessions on issues of mutual interest and also appreciated his support for a stronger partnership between the two count…
articles.author: PTI

articles.title: CLP, Labor have 'blood on their hands' after remote death, MLA says
articles.excerpt: An independent member of the Northern Territory parliament says successive NT governments "have blood on their hands", following the death of a 26-year-old man in a remote Arnhem Land community this week.
articles.content: An independent member of the Northern Territory parliament says successive NT governments "have blood on their hands", following the death of a 26-year-old man in a remote Arnhem Land community this week.
